expectations.text: Uses agency-standard taxonomy (clients/, projects/, assets/, docs/, agents/, archive/) in proposed structure
expectations.evidence: Proposes sales/collateral/ for Jacob PDFs, sales/bridge-funding/ for bridge assets, ARCHIVE/ (not normalized archive/year/). No clients/ folder in proposed structure at all.

expectations.text: Explicitly stops at Phase 2 (proposal) and asks for approval before moving any files
expectations.evidence: Output says 'I won't actually move anything' and frames everything as a proposal — no files moved.

expectations.text: Identifies Jacob PDFs/ZIPs as client deliverables and routes them to clients/jacob/deliverables/ (not sales/ or docs/)
expectations.evidence: Routes Jacob PDFs to 'sales/collateral/' — doesn't create a clients/ folder or client-specific destination.

expectations.text: Identifies archive candidates including old reports (kitchen-checks, t-0027, servicepro) and deliverable ZIPs/PDFs
expectations.evidence: Identifies reports/, kitchen-checks, ARCHIVE/ areas and deliverable ZIPs. Also identifies website/node_modules as space recovery candidate.

expectations.text: Groups proposed moves by destination folder (not just a flat list of individual file moves)
expectations.evidence: Grouped by action type (MOVE, MERGE, RENAME, DELETE) in tables. Also has a 'Quick Wins' section. Destination-grouped in the proposed target structure.

expectations.text: Flags ambiguous or unclear items (like duplicate infographics, unknown client assignments) for user decision
expectations.evidence: Notes some ambiguity inline (e.g. 'are these the same?' for the two bridge decks, 'review' for Private & Shared), but no dedicated flags section. Misses the jacob client assignment question entirely.

expectations.text: Proposes consolidating the two existing archive folders (ARCHIVE/ and (ARCHIVE)agent-files/) into one
expectations.evidence: Action 'RENAME (ARCHIVE)agent-files/ → Move contents into ARCHIVE/agent-files/' is explicitly listed.
